name: public-threat-actor-monitor
title: Fresh Threat Actor & Ransomware Activity Monitor
description: Monitor fresh public threat actor and ransomware activity. Get safe metadata rows for actors, victims or targets, sectors, countries, TTPs, confidence, freshness, and source provenance without raw leaked data.

exampleRunInput.body:
{
  "queries": [
    "LockBit3",
    "Qilin",
    "Akira",
    "Play",
    "Clop",
    "LockBit2",
    "RansomHub",
    "INC Ransom",
    "ALPHV",
    "DragonForce",
    "BianLian",
    "Black Basta",
    "Medusa",
    "TheGentlemen",
    "SafePay",
    "8Base",
    "Lynx",
    "Everest",
    "Conti",
    "Dispossessor",
    "LockBit5",
    "Pysa",
    "Hunters",
    "NightSpire",
    "KillSec",
    "Sinobi",
    "Rhysida",
    "Cactus",
    "Royal",
    "Hive"
  ],
  "maxRowsPerQuery": 500,
  "includeActivity": true,
  "includeTargets": true,
  "includeTtps": true,
  "includeSources": true,
  "includeDatasets": false,
  "includeCoverageGaps": false,
  "includeHeldRows": false
}
